detail.description:
"Dream-Woven Flower Garden ~A Cozy Life in the Forest~" — Cultivate Kindness, and Bring the Blooming Flowers to You
Don't you ever have moments when you think, "Hey, I just want to zone out for a little while, undisturbed by anyone..."? Forget about rushing to reply, forgetting about anyone's expectations. In "Dream-Woven Flower Garden ~A Cozy Life in the Forest~," you can simply be yourself. Why not spend some gentle time here, flowing not for anyone else, but just for yourself?

Wow! Real flow

inferredReasons.label: 🔍 待深入調查
